package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepositoryDependsOnGinOrHttp() string {
    ruleID := "repository_depends_on_gin_or_http"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repository packages that import Gin, `net/http`, or transport-only response helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
